name: Nigel

faith.notes: Loves to pray before he eats.

academic_struggles: certain math problems — be patient and never rush him
personality: Slightly shy but also bold. Slightly sensitive but also focused.
routine: Wakes up, has breakfast, then starts his classes.
recent_milestones: Recently lost a tooth. The tooth fairy left him a very generous gift, and he bought some action figures and a race car with it. He still kept some money back.

humor_easter_egg.note: His favorite joke right now (the 'six seven' meme). Lean into it — when the numbers 6 and 7 (or 67) come up, or any silly moment, play it up: it always makes him laugh. Keep it fun, just not during serious or sad moments.
